\tzpentry{ID5826}{Kaluza-Klein Quantum State Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5826 introduces Kaluza-Klein Quantum State Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$\Psi_0 = \sum_i \mathcal{A}_i \cdot \text{EigenMode}[n_i, l_i, m_i] \cdot e^{2\pi i m_{KK}^{(i)} z/R_{KK}}$
\]
